workspaces.deleteMessage: If you confirm, this path (workspace) will be removed from your account. This does not delete your full account.
workspaces.deleteRecoveryNote: This is a soft delete in the database; recovery may be possible via support if needed.
workspaces.deleteOwnerOnly: Only the owner can delete this path
workspaces.deleteMissingId: Could not identify the workspace to delete
workspaces.empty: You have no workspaces linked to your account yet.

createWorkspace.title: One step to start your academic journey
createWorkspace.subtitle: Create a new workspace to organize exams, track student performance, and build an integrated learning experience under your current account.
